sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n8973" key="a)nqupoxw/rhsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνθυπο-χώρησις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n8973.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">retiring in turn,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">εἰς τὸ ἐκτός</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.903d</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
